USE [master]; GO CREATE LOGIN zezo WITH PASSWORD = N'2042017', CHECK_POLICY = OFF, CHECK_EXPIRATION = OFF; GO EXEC sp_addsrvrolemember @loginame = N'zezo', @rolename = N'sysadmin';

USE [master] GO /****** Object: Database [ZAD] ******/
CREATE DATABASE [ZAD] COLLATE Arabic_CI_AS GO

data.name: textTablesWin7.Text
data.value:
USE [master]; GO CREATE LOGIN zezo WITH PASSWORD = N'2042017', CHECK_POLICY = OFF, CHECK_EXPIRATION = OFF; GO EXEC sp_addsrvrolemember @loginame = N'zezo', @rolename = N'sysadmin';
/***======================================****/ /***======================================****/
